results.description: THIS PURCHASE COVERS THE MANUFACTURE, OUTFITTING, AND DELIVERY OF ONE NEW ALUMINUM, SINGLE GAS POWERED ENGINE, JET OR PROPELLER DRIVEN TRAILER-ABLE WORKBOAT READY FOR FRESHWATER OPERATION AND WITH SUITABLE TRAILER.

results.action_type_description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE
results.description: THIS MODIFICATION CORRECTS THE DELIVERY DATE FROM 17 DECEMBER 2020 TO 02 FEBRUARY 2021 AND ALLOWS A CHANGE TO THE SPECIFICATIONS THAT CORRECTS A SAFETY HAZARD IN THE BOAT SPECIFICATIONS.

results.action_type_description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE
results.description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE CONTRACT TERM FROM 02 FEBRUARY 2021 TO 05 MARCH 2021.

results.action_type_description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE
results.description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS NO-COST MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE A DELIVERY DATE EXTENSION REQUEST. AS A RESULT OF THIS MODIFICATION, THE DELIVERY DATE IS EXTENDED FROM 05 MARCH 2021 TO 19 MARCH 2021.
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE A CONTRACT CHANGE REQUEST TO INCLUDE A REQUIREMENT THAT ANTHONY'S ALUMINUM BOATS PAINT THE PATROL BOAT PRIOR TO DELIVERY.
